summary: Comprehensive test suite following TDD methodology with complete coverage of all requirements: JUnit/JSON parsing, aggregation, flaky test detection, markdown generation, and GitHub Actions workflow integration. Tests are well-organized with clear fixtures and good use of BeforeAll blocks. Strengths: exact-value assertions in act integration tests, proper error handling tests, workflow validation, all five core functions tested thoroughly. Weaknesses: two test files testing similar functionality (duplication), some edge cases untested (empty files, Unicode in messages, zero-test scenarios), complex integration tests could be clearer, fixture content not shown. Would catch most regressions but missing some boundary condition coverage.
